        "originalContents": "---\nimport type { CollectionEntry } from \"astro:content\";\nimport { getPostUrlBySlug } from \"@utils/url-utils\";\nimport PostCard from \"./PostCard.astro\";\n\nconst { page } = Astro.props;\n\nlet delay = 0;\nconst interval = 50;\n---\n\u003cdiv class=\"transition flex flex-col rounded-[var(--radius-large)] bg-[var(--card-bg)] py-1 md:py-0 md:bg-transparent md:gap-4 mb-4\"\u003e\n    {page.data.map((entry: CollectionEntry\u003c\"posts\"\u003e) =\u003e (\n        \u003cPostCard\n                entry={entry}\n                title={entry.data.title}\n                tags={entry.data.tags}\n                category={entry.data.category}\n                published={entry.data.published}\n                updated={entry.data.updated}\n                url={getPostUrlBySlug(entry.slug)}\n                image={entry.data.image}\n                description={entry.data.description}\n                draft={entry.data.draft}\n                class:list=\"onload-animation\"\n                style={&#96;animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + ${delay++ * interval}ms);&#96;}\n        \u003e\u003c/PostCard\u003e\n    ))}\n\u003c/div\u003e",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 27
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "src/components/PostPage.astro"

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "| &#96;description&#96; | A short description of the post. Displayed on index page.                                                                                                                                                   |\n| &#96;image&#96;       | The cover image path of the post.\u003cbr/\u003e1. Start with &#96;http://&#96; or &#96;https://&#96;: Use web image\u003cbr/\u003e2. Start with &#96;/&#96;: For image in &#96;public&#96; dir\u003cbr/\u003e3. With none of the prefixes: Relative to the markdown file |\n| &#96;tags&#96;        | The tags of the post.                                                                                                                                                                                       |\n| &#96;category&#96;    | The category of the post.                                                                                                                                                                                   |\n| &#96;draft&#96;        | If this post is still a draft, which won't be displayed.                                                                                                                                                    |\n\n## Where to Place the Post Files\n\n\n\nYour post files should be placed in &#96;src/content/posts/&#96; directory. You can also create sub-directories to better organize your posts and assets.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nsrc/content/posts/\n├── post-1.md\n└── post-2/\n    ├── cover.png\n    └── index.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{\n  \"$schema\": \"https://frontmatter.codes/frontmatter.schema.json\",\n  \"frontMatter.framework.id\": \"astro\",\n  \"frontMatter.preview.host\": \"http://localhost:4321\",\n  \"frontMatter.content.publicFolder\": \"public\",\n  \"frontMatter.content.pageFolders\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"posts\",\n      \"path\": \"[[workspace]]/src/content/posts\"\n    }\n  ],\n  \"frontMatter.taxonomy.contentTypes\": [\n    {\n      \"name\": \"default\",\n      \"pageBundle\": true,\n      \"previewPath\": \"'blog'\",\n      \"filePrefix\": null,\n      \"clearEmpty\": true,\n      \"fields\": [\n        {\n          \"title\": \"title\",\n          \"name\": \"title\",\n          \"type\": \"string\",\n          \"single\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"description\",\n          \"name\": \"description\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"published\",\n          \"name\": \"published\",\n          \"type\": \"datetime\",\n          \"default\": \"{{now}}\",\n          \"isPublishDate\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"preview\",\n          \"name\": \"image\",\n          \"type\": \"image\",\n          \"isPreviewImage\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"tags\",\n          \"name\": \"tags\",\n          \"type\": \"list\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"category\",\n          \"name\": \"category\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"draft\",\n          \"name\": \"draft\",\n          \"type\": \"boolean\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"language\",\n          \"name\": \"language\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n",

        "originalContents": "{\n  \"$schema\": \"https://frontmatter.codes/frontmatter.schema.json\",\n  \"frontMatter.framework.id\": \"astro\",\n  \"frontMatter.preview.host\": \"http://localhost:4321\",\n  \"frontMatter.content.publicFolder\": \"public\",\n  \"frontMatter.content.pageFolders\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"posts\",\n      \"path\": \"[[workspace]]/src/content/posts\"\n    }\n  ],\n  \"frontMatter.taxonomy.contentTypes\": [\n    {\n      \"name\": \"default\",\n      \"pageBundle\": true,\n      \"previewPath\": \"'blog'\",\n      \"filePrefix\": null,\n      \"clearEmpty\": true,\n      \"fields\": [\n        {\n          \"title\": \"title\",\n          \"name\": \"title\",\n          \"type\": \"string\",\n          \"single\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"description\",\n          \"name\": \"description\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"published\",\n          \"name\": \"published\",\n          \"type\": \"datetime\",\n          \"default\": \"{{now}}\",\n          \"isPublishDate\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"preview\",\n          \"name\": \"image\",\n          \"type\": \"image\",\n          \"isPreviewImage\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"tags\",\n          \"name\": \"tags\",\n          \"type\": \"list\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"category\",\n          \"name\": \"category\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"draft\",\n          \"name\": \"draft\",\n          \"type\": \"boolean\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"language\",\n          \"name\": \"language\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n",

        "contents": "import { defineCollection, z } from \"astro:content\";\n\nconst postsCollection = defineCollection({\n\tschema: z.object({\n\t\ttitle: z.string(),\n\t\tpublished: z.date(),\n\t\tupdated: z.date().optional(),\n\t\tdraft: z.boolean().optional().default(false),\n\t\tdescription: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\t\timage: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\t\ttags: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),\n\t\tcategory: z.string().optional().nullable().default(\"\"),\n\t\tlang: z.string().optional().default(\"\"),\n\n\t\t/* For internal use */\n\t\tprevTitle: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tprevSlug: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tnextTitle: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t\tnextSlug: z.string().default(\"\"),\n\t}),\n});\nconst specCollection = defineCollection({\n\tschema: z.object({}),\n});\nexport const collections = {\n\tposts: postsCollection,\n\tspec: specCollection,\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport async function GET(context: APIContext) {\n\tconst blog = await getSortedPosts();\n\n\treturn rss({\n\t\ttitle: siteConfig.title,\n\t\tdescription: siteConfig.subtitle || \"No description\",\n\t\tsite: context.site ?? \"https://fuwari.vercel.app\",\n\t\titems: blog.map((post) =\u003e {\n\t\t\tconst content =\n\t\t\t\ttypeof post.body === \"string\" ? post.body : String(post.body || \"\");\n\t\t\tconst cleanedContent = stripInvalidXmlChars(content);\n\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\ttitle: post.data.title,\n\t\t\t\tpubDate: post.data.published,\n\t\t\t\tdescription: post.data.description || \"\",\n\t\t\t\tlink: url(&#96;/posts/${post.slug}/&#96;),\n\t\t\t\tcontent: sanitizeHtml(parser.render(cleanedContent), {\n\t\t\t\t\tallowedTags: sanitizeHtml.defaults.allowedTags.concat([\"img\"]),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t}),\n\t\tcustomData: &#96;\u003clanguage\u003e${siteConfig.lang}\u003c/language\u003e&#96;,\n\t});\n}",

        "contents": "\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { onMount } from \"svelte\";\n\nimport I18nKey from \"../i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"../i18n/translation\";\nimport { getPostUrlBySlug } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\n\nexport let tags: string[];\nexport let categories: string[];\nexport let sortedPosts: Post[] = [];\n\nconst params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\ntags = params.has(\"tag\") ? params.getAll(\"tag\") : [];\ncategories = params.has(\"category\") ? params.getAll(\"category\") : [];\nconst uncategorized = params.get(\"uncategorized\");\n\ninterface Post {\n\tslug: string;\n\tdata: {\n\t\ttitle: string;\n\t\ttags: string[];\n\t\tcategory?: string;\n\t\tpublished: Date;\n\t};\n}\n\ninterface Group {\n\tyear: number;\n\tposts: Post[];\n}\n\nlet groups: Group[] = [];\n\nfunction formatDate(date: Date) {\n\tconst month = (date.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, \"0\");\n\tconst day = date.getDate().toString().padStart(2, \"0\");\n\treturn &#96;${month}-${day}&#96;;\n}\n\nfunction formatTag(tagList: string[]) {\n\treturn tagList.map((t) =\u003e &#96;#${t}&#96;).join(\" \");\n}\n\nonMount(async () =\u003e {\n\tlet filteredPosts: Post[] = sortedPosts;\n\n\tif (tags.length \u003e 0) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter(\n\t\t\t(post) =\u003e\n\t\t\t\tArray.isArray(post.data.tags) \u0026\u0026\n\t\t\t\tpost.data.tags.some((tag) =\u003e tags.includes(tag)),\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\n\tif (categories.length \u003e 0) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter(\n\t\t\t(post) =\u003e post.data.category \u0026\u0026 categories.includes(post.data.category),\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\n\tif (uncategorized) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter((post) =\u003e !post.data.category);\n\t}\n\n\tconst grouped = filteredPosts.reduce(\n\t\t(acc, post) =\u003e {\n\t\t\tconst year = post.data.published.getFullYear();\n\t\t\tif (!acc[year]) {\n\t\t\t\tacc[year] = [];\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tacc[year].push(post);\n\t\t\treturn acc;\n\t\t},\n\t\t{} as Record\u003cnumber, Post[]\u003e,\n\t);\n\n\tconst groupedPostsArray = Object.keys(grouped).map((yearStr) =\u003e ({\n\t\tyear: Number.parseInt(yearStr, 10),\n\t\tposts: grouped[Number.parseInt(yearStr, 10)],\n\t}));\n\n\tgroupedPostsArray.sort((a, b) =\u003e b.year - a.year);\n\n\tgroups = groupedPostsArray;\n});\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n",

params.getAll(\"tag\") : [];\ncategories = params.has(\"category\") ? params.getAll(\"category\") : [];\nconst uncategorized = params.get(\"uncategorized\");\n\ninterface Post {\n\tslug: string;\n\tdata: {\n\t\ttitle: string;\n\t\ttags: string[];\n\t\tcategory?: string;\n\t\tpublished: Date;\n\t};\n}\n\ninterface Group {\n\tyear: number;\n\tposts: Post[];\n}\n\nlet groups: Group[] = [];\n\nfunction formatDate(date: Date) {\n\tconst month = (date.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, \"0\");\n\tconst day = date.getDate().toString().padStart(2, \"0\");\n\treturn &#96;${month}-${day}&#96;;\n}\n\nfunction formatTag(tagList: string[]) {\n\treturn tagList.map((t) =\u003e &#96;#${t}&#96;).join(\" \");\n}\n\nonMount(async () =\u003e {\n\tlet filteredPosts: Post[] = sortedPosts;\n\n\tif (tags.length \u003e 0) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter(\n\t\t\t(post) =\u003e\n\t\t\t\tArray.isArray(post.data.tags) \u0026\u0026\n\t\t\t\tpost.data.tags.some((tag) =\u003e tags.includes(tag)),\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\n\tif (categories.length \u003e 0) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter(\n\t\t\t(post) =\u003e post.data.category \u0026\u0026 categories.includes(post.data.category),\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\n\tif (uncategorized) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter((post) =\u003e !post.data.category);\n\t}\n\n\tconst grouped = filteredPosts.reduce(\n\t\t(acc, post) =\u003e {\n\t\t\tconst year = post.data.published.getFullYear();\n\t\t\tif (!acc[year]) {\n\t\t\t\tacc[year] = [];\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tacc[year].push(post);\n\t\t\treturn acc;\n\t\t},\n\t\t{} as Record\u003cnumber, Post[]\u003e,\n\t);\n\n\tconst groupedPostsArray = Object.keys(grouped).map((yearStr) =\u003e ({\n\t\tyear: Number.parseInt(yearStr, 10),\n\t\tposts: grouped[Number.parseInt(yearStr, 10)],\n\t}));\n\n\tgroupedPostsArray.sort((a, b) =\u003e b.year - a.year);\n\n\tgroups = groupedPostsArray;\n});\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { type CollectionEntry, getCollection } from \"astro:content\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport { getCategoryUrl } from \"@utils/url-utils.ts\";\n\n// // Retrieve posts and sort them by publication date\nasync function getRawSortedPosts() {\n\tconst allBlogPosts = await getCollection(\"posts\", ({ data }) =\u003e {\n\t\treturn import.meta.env.PROD ? data.draft !== true : true;\n\t});\n\n\tconst sorted = allBlogPosts.sort((a, b) =\u003e {\n\t\tconst dateA = new Date(a.data.published);\n\t\tconst dateB = new Date(b.data.published);\n\t\treturn dateA \u003e dateB ? -1 : 1;\n\t});\n\treturn sorted;\n}",

            "text": "// // Retrieve posts and sort them by publication date"

            "text": "async function getRawSortedPosts() {"

            "text": "\tconst allBlogPosts = await getCollection(\"posts\", ({ data }) =\u003e {"

        "originalContents": "import { type CollectionEntry, getCollection } from \"astro:content\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport { getCategoryUrl } from \"@utils/url-utils.ts\";\n\n// // Retrieve posts and sort them by publication date\nasync function getRawSortedPosts() {\n\tconst allBlogPosts = await getCollection(\"posts\", ({ data }) =\u003e {\n\t\treturn import.meta.env.PROD ? data.draft !== true : true;\n\t});\n\n\tconst sorted = allBlogPosts.sort((a, b) =\u003e {\n\t\tconst dateA = new Date(a.data.published);\n\t\tconst dateB = new Date(b.data.published);\n\t\treturn dateA \u003e dateB ? -1 : 1;\n\t});\n\treturn sorted;\n}",

        "contents": "---\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport { siteConfig } from \"../../config\";\nimport { url } from \"../../utils/url-utils\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tclass?: string;\n\theadings: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nlet { headings = [] } = Astro.props;\n\nlet minDepth = 10;\nfor (const heading of headings) {\n\tminDepth = Math.min(minDepth, heading.depth);\n}\n\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\nconst isPostsRoute = Astro.url.pathname.startsWith(url(\"/posts/\"));\n\nconst removeTailingHash = (text: string) =\u003e {\n\tlet lastIndexOfHash = text.lastIndexOf(\"#\");\n\tif (lastIndexOfHash !== text.length - 1) {\n\t\treturn text;\n\t}\n\n\treturn text.substring(0, lastIndexOfHash);\n};\n\nlet heading1Count = 1;\n\nconst maxLevel = siteConfig.toc.depth;\n---\n{isPostsRoute \u0026\u0026\n\u003ctable-of-contents class:list={[className, \"group\"]}\u003e\n    {headings.filter((heading) =\u003e heading.depth \u003c minDepth + maxLevel).map((heading) =\u003e\n            \u003ca href={&#96;#${heading.slug}&#96;} class=\"px-2 flex gap-2 relative transition w-full min-h-9 rounded-xl\n        hover:bg-[var(--toc-btn-hover)] active:bg-[var(--toc-btn-active)] py-2\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n/* TODO This is a temporary solution for style flicker issue when the transition is activated */\n/* issue link: https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/8711, the solution get from here too */\n/* update: fixed in Astro 3.2.4 */\n/*\nfunction disableAnimation() {\n\tconst css = document.createElement('style')\n\tcss.appendChild(\n\t\tdocument.createTextNode(\n\t\t\t&#96;*{\n              -webkit-transition:none!important;\n              -moz-transition:none!important;\n              -o-transition:none!important;\n              -ms-transition:none!important;\n              transition:none!important\n              }&#96;\n\t\t)\n\t)\n\tdocument.head.appendChild(css)\n\n\treturn () =\u003e {\n\t\t// Force restyle\n\t\t;(() =\u003e window.getComputedStyle(document.body))()\n\n\t\t// Wait for next tick before removing\n\t\tsetTimeout(() =\u003e {\n\t\t\tdocument.head.removeChild(css)\n\t\t}, 1)\n\t}\n}\n*/\n\nconst bannerEnabled = !!document.getElementById('banner-wrapper')\n\nfunction setClickOutsideToClose(panel: string, ignores: string[]) {\n\tdocument.addEventListener(\"click\", event =\u003e {\n\t\tlet panelDom = document.getElementById(panel);\n\t\tlet tDom = event.target;\n\t\tif (!(tDom instanceof Node)) return;\t\t// Ensure the event target is an HTML Node\n\t\tfor (let ig of ignores) {\n\t\t\tlet ie = document.getElementById(ig)\n\t\t\tif (ie == tDom || (ie?.contains(tDom))) {\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tpanelDom!.classList.add(\"float-panel-closed\");\n\t});\n}\nsetClickOutsideToClose(\"display-setting\", [\"display-setting\", \"display-settings-switch\"])\nsetClickOutsideToClose(\"nav-menu-panel\", [\"nav-menu-panel\", \"nav-menu-switch\"])\nsetClickOutsideToClose(\"search-panel\", [\"search-panel\", \"search-bar\", \"search-switch\"])\n\n\nfunction loadTheme() {\n\tconst theme = getStoredTheme()\n\tsetTheme(theme)\n}\n\nfunction loadHue() {\n\tsetHue(getHue())\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "\n/* TODO This is a temporary solution for style flicker issue when the transition is activated */\n/* issue link: https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/8711, the solution get from here too */\n/* update: fixed in Astro 3.2.4 */\n/*\nfunction disableAnimation() {\n\tconst css = document.createElement('style')\n\tcss.appendChild(\n\t\tdocument.createTextNode(\n\t\t\t&#96;*{\n              -webkit-transition:none!important;\n              -moz-transition:none!important;\n              -o-transition:none!important;\n              -ms-transition:none!important;\n              transition:none!important\n              }&#96;\n\t\t)\n\t)\n\tdocument.head.appendChild(css)\n\n\treturn () =\u003e {\n\t\t// Force restyle\n\t\t;(() =\u003e window.getComputedStyle(document.body))()\n\n\t\t// Wait for next tick before removing\n\t\tsetTimeout(() =\u003e {\n\t\t\tdocument.head.removeChild(css)\n\t\t}, 1)\n\t}\n}\n*/\n\nconst bannerEnabled = !!document.getElementById('banner-wrapper')\n\nfunction setClickOutsideToClose(panel: string, ignores: string[]) {\n\tdocument.addEventListener(\"click\", event =\u003e {\n\t\tlet panelDom = document.getElementById(panel);\n\t\tlet tDom = event.target;\n\t\tif (!(tDom instanceof Node)) return;\t\t// Ensure the event target is an HTML Node\n\t\tfor (let ig of ignores) {\n\t\t\tlet ie = document.getElementById(ig)\n\t\t\tif (ie == tDom || (ie?.contains(tDom))) {\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tpanelDom!.classList.add(\"float-panel-closed\");\n\t});\n}\nsetClickOutsideToClose(\"display-setting\", [\"display-setting\", \"display-settings-switch\"])\nsetClickOutsideToClose(\"nav-menu-panel\", [\"nav-menu-panel\", \"nav-menu-switch\"])\nsetClickOutsideToClose(\"search-panel\", [\"search-panel\", \"search-bar\", \"search-switch\"])\n\n\nfunction loadTheme() {\n\tconst theme = getStoredTheme()\n\tsetTheme(theme)\n}\n\nfunction loadHue() {\n\tsetHue(getHue())\n}\n\n",

        "contents": "\u003e\n\t\t\u003cConfigCarrier\u003e\u003c/ConfigCarrier\u003e\n\t\t\u003cslot /\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003c!-- increase the page height during page transition to prevent the scrolling animation from jumping --\u003e\n\t\t\u003cdiv id=\"page-height-extend\" class=\"hidden h-[300vh]\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\t\u003c/body\u003e\n\u003c/html\u003e\n\n\u003cstyle is:global define:vars={{\n\tbannerOffset,\n\t'banner-height-home': &#96;${BANNER_HEIGHT_HOME}vh&#96;,\n\t'banner-height': &#96;${BANNER_HEIGHT}vh&#96;,\n}}\u003e\n@tailwind components;\n@layer components {\n\t.enable-banner.is-home #banner-wrapper {\n\t\t@apply h-[var(--banner-height-home)] translate-y-[var(--banner-height-extend)]\n\t}\n\t.enable-banner #banner-wrapper {\n\t\t@apply h-[var(--banner-height-home)]\n\t}\n\n\t.enable-banner.is-home #banner {\n\t\t@apply h-[var(--banner-height-home)] translate-y-0\n\t}\n\t.enable-banner #banner {\n\t\t@apply h-[var(--banner-height-home)] translate-y-[var(--bannerOffset)]\n\t}\n\t.enable-banner.is-home #main-grid {\n\t\t@apply translate-y-[var(--banner-height-extend)];\n\t}\n\t.enable-banner #top-row {\n\t\t@apply h-[calc(var(--banner-height-home)_-_4.5rem)] transition-all duration-300\n\t}\n\t.enable-banner.is-home #sidebar-sticky {\n\t\t@apply top-[calc(1rem_-_var(--banner-height-extend))]\n\t}\n\t.navbar-hidden {\n\t\t@apply opacity-0 -translate-y-16\n\t}\n}\n\u003c/style\u003e\n\n\u003cscript\u003e\nimport 'overlayscrollbars/overlayscrollbars.css';\nimport {\n\tOverlayScrollbars,\n\t// ScrollbarsHidingPlugin,\n\t// SizeObserverPlugin,\n\t// ClickScrollPlugin\n} from 'overlayscrollbars';\nimport {getHue, getStoredTheme, setHue, setTheme} from \"../utils/setting-utils\";\nimport {pathsEqual, url} from \"../utils/url-utils\";\nimport {\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_HOME,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tMAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport { siteConfig } from '../config';\n\n/* Preload         "contents": "---\nimport BackToTop from \"@components/control/BackToTop.astro\";\nimport Footer from \"@components/Footer.astro\";\nimport Navbar from \"@components/Navbar.astro\";\nimport SideBar from \"@components/widget/SideBar.astro\";\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport TOC from \"../components/widget/TOC.astro\";\nimport { siteConfig } from \"../config\";\nimport {\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tMAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport Layout from \"./Layout.astro\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n\theadings?: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nconst {\n\ttitle,\n\tbanner,\n\tdescription,\n\tlang,\n\tsetOGTypeArticle,\n\theadings = [],\n} = Astro.props;\nconst hasBannerCredit =\n\tsiteConfig.banner.enable \u0026\u0026 siteConfig.banner.credit.enable;\nconst hasBannerLink = !!siteConfig.banner.credit.url;\n\nconst mainPanelTop = siteConfig.banner.enable\n\t? &#96;calc(${BANNER_HEIGHT}vh - ${MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT}rem)&#96;\n\t: \"5.5rem\";\n---\n\n\u003cLayout title={title} banner={banner} description={description} lang={lang} setOGTypeArticle={setOGTypeArticle}\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Navbar --\u003e\n\u003cslot slot=\"head\" name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\u003cdiv id=\"top-row\" class=\"z-50 pointer-events-none relative transition-all duration-700 max-w-[var(--page-width)] px-0 md:px-4 mx-auto\" class:list={[\"\"]}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"navbar-wrapper\" class=\"pointer-events-auto sticky top-0 transition-all\"\u003e\n        \u003cNavbar\u003e\u003c/Navbar\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Banner --\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport BackToTop from \"@components/control/BackToTop.astro\";\nimport Footer from \"@components/Footer.astro\";\nimport Navbar from \"@components/Navbar.astro\";\nimport SideBar from \"@components/widget/SideBar.astro\";\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport TOC from \"../components/widget/TOC.astro\";\nimport { siteConfig } from \"../config\";\nimport {\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tMAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport Layout from \"./Layout.astro\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n\theadings?: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nconst {\n\ttitle,\n\tbanner,\n\tdescription,\n\tlang,\n\tsetOGTypeArticle,\n\theadings = [],\n} = Astro.props;\nconst hasBannerCredit =\n\tsiteConfig.banner.enable \u0026\u0026 siteConfig.banner.credit.enable;\nconst hasBannerLink = !!siteConfig.banner.credit.url;\n\nconst mainPanelTop = siteConfig.banner.enable\n\t? &#96;calc(${BANNER_HEIGHT}vh - ${MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT}rem)&#96;\n\t: \"5.5rem\";\n---\n\n\u003cLayout title={title} banner={banner} description={description} lang={lang} setOGTypeArticle={setOGTypeArticle}\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Navbar --\u003e\n\u003cslot slot=\"head\" name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\u003cdiv id=\"top-row\" class=\"z-50 pointer-events-none relative transition-all duration-700 max-w-[var(--page-width)] px-0 md:px-4 mx-auto\" class:list={[\"\"]}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"navbar-wrapper\" class=\"pointer-events-auto sticky top-0 transition-all\"\u003e\n        \u003cNavbar\u003e\u003c/Navbar\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Banner --\u003e\n",

        "contents": "function showBanner() {\n\tif (!siteConfig.banner.enable) return;\n\n\tconst banner = document.getElementById('banner');\n\tif (!banner) {\n\t\tconsole.error('Banner element not found');\n\t\treturn;\n\t}\n\n\tbanner.classList.remove('opacity-0', 'scale-105');\n}\n\nfunction init() {\n\t// disableAnimation()()\t\t// TODO\n\tloadTheme();\n\tloadHue();\n\tinitCustomScrollbar();\n\tshowBanner();\n}\n\n/* Load settings when entering the site */\ninit();\n\nconst setup = () =\u003e {\n\t// TODO: temp solution to change the height of the banner\n/*\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('animation:out:start', () =\u003e {\n\t\tconst path = window.location.pathname\n\t\tconst body = document.querySelector('body')\n\t\tif (path[path.length - 1] === '/' \u0026\u0026 !body.classList.contains('is-home')) {\n\t\t\tbody.classList.add('is-home')\n\t\t} else if (path[path.length - 1] !== '/' \u0026\u0026 body.classList.contains('is-home')) {\n\t\t\tbody.classList.remove('is-home')\n\t\t}\n\t})\n",

        "originalContents": "function showBanner() {\n\tif (!siteConfig.banner.enable) return;\n\n\tconst banner = document.getElementById('banner');\n\tif (!banner) {\n\t\tconsole.error('Banner element not found');\n\t\treturn;\n\t}\n\n\tbanner.classList.remove('opacity-0', 'scale-105');\n}\n\nfunction init() {\n\t// disableAnimation()()\t\t// TODO\n\tloadTheme();\n\tloadHue();\n\tinitCustomScrollbar();\n\tshowBanner();\n}\n\n/* Load settings when entering the site */\ninit();\n\nconst setup = () =\u003e {\n\t// TODO: temp solution to change the height of the banner\n/*\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('animation:out:start', () =\u003e {\n\t\tconst path = window.location.pathname\n\t\tconst body = document.querySelector('body')\n\t\tif (path[path.length - 1] === '/' \u0026\u0026 !body.classList.contains('is-home')) {\n\t\t\tbody.classList.add('is-home')\n\t\t} else if (path[path.length - 1] !== '/' \u0026\u0026 body.classList.contains('is-home')) {\n\t\t\tbody.classList.remove('is-home')\n\t\t}\n\t})\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\twindow.swup.hooks.on('visit:end', (_visit: {to: {url: string}}) =\u003e {\n\t\tsetTimeout(() =\u003e {\n\t\t\tconst heightExtend = document.getElementById('page-height-extend')\n\t\t\tif (heightExtend) {\n\t\t\t\theightExtend.classList.add('hidden')\n\t\t\t}\n\n            // Just make the transition looks better\n            const toc = document.getElementById('toc-wrapper');\n            if (toc) {\n                toc.classList.remove('toc-not-ready')\n            }\n        }, 200)\n\t});\n}\nif (window?.swup?.hooks) {\n\tsetup()\n} else {\n\tdocument.addEventListener('swup:enable', setup)\n}\n\nlet backToTopBtn = document.getElementById('back-to-top-btn');\nlet toc = document.getElementById('toc-wrapper');\nlet navbar = document.getElementById('navbar-wrapper')\nfunction scrollFunction() {\n\tlet bannerHeight = window.innerHeight * (BANNER_HEIGHT / 100)\n\n\tif (backToTopBtn) {\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight) {\n\t\t\tbackToTopBtn.classList.remove('hide')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tbackToTopBtn.classList.add('hide')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif (bannerEnabled \u0026\u0026 toc) {\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight) {\n\t\t\ttoc.classList.remove('toc-hide')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\ttoc.classList.add('toc-hide')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif (!bannerEnabled) return\n\tif (navbar) {\n\t\tconst NAVBAR_HEIGHT = 72\n\t\tconst MAIN_PANEL_EXCESS_HEIGHT = MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT * 16\t\t\t// The height the main panel overlaps the banner\n\n\t\tlet bannerHeight = BANNER_HEIGHT\n\t\tif (document.body.classList.contains('lg:is-home') \u0026\u0026 window.innerWidth \u003e= 1024) {\n\t\t\tbannerHeight = BANNER_HEIGHT_HOME\n\t\t}\n\t\tlet threshold = window.innerHeight * (bannerHeight / 100) - NAVBAR_HEIGHT - MAIN_PANEL_EXCESS_HEIGHT - 16\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e= threshold || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e= threshold) {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.add('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.remove('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\nwindow.onscroll = scrollFunction\n\n",

NAVBAR_HEIGHT - MAIN_PANEL_EXCESS_HEIGHT - 16\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e= threshold || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e= threshold) {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.add('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.remove('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\nwindow.onscroll = scrollFunction\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\t\t\u003cscript is:inline define:vars={{DEFAULT_THEME, LIGHT_MODE, DARK_MODE, AUTO_MODE, BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND, PAGE_WIDTH, configHue}}\u003e\n\t\t\t// Load the theme from local storage\n\t\t\tconst theme = localStorage.getItem('theme') || DEFAULT_THEME;\n\t\t\tswitch (theme) {\n\t\t\t\tcase LIGHT_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\tcase DARK_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\tcase AUTO_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tif (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Load the hue from local storage\n\t\t\tconst hue = localStorage.getItem('hue') || configHue;\n\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.style.setProperty('--hue', hue);\n\n\t\t\t// calculate the --banner-height-extend, which needs to be a multiple of 4 to avoid blurry text\n\t\t\tlet offset = Math.floor(window.innerHeight * (BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND / 100));\n\t\t\toffset = offset - offset % 4;\n\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.style.setProperty('--banner-height-extend', &#96;${offset}px&#96;);\n\t\t\u003c/script\u003e\n\t\t\u003cstyle define:vars={{\n\t\t\tconfigHue,\n\t\t\t'page-width': &#96;${PAGE_WIDTH}rem&#96;,\n\t\t}}\u003e\u003c/style\u003e  \u003c!-- defines global css variables. This will be applied to \u003chtml\u003e \u003cbody\u003e and some other elements idk why --\u003e\n\n\n\t\t\u003cslot name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003clink rel=\"alternate\" type=\"application/rss+xml\" title={profileConfig.name} href={&#96;${Astro.site}rss.xml&#96;}/\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003c!-- MermaidJS --\u003e\n\t\t\u003cscript type=\"module\"\u003e\n\t\t\timport mermaid from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@10/dist/mermaid.esm.min.mjs';\n\t\t\tmermaid.initialize({ \n\t\t\t\tstartOnLoad: true,\n\t\t\t\ttheme: 'dark',\n\t\t\t\tsecurityLevel: 'loose'\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\twindow.mermaid = mermaid;\n\t\t\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\t\u003c/head\u003e\n\t\u003cbody class=\" min-h-screen transition \" class:list={[{\"lg:is-home\": isHomePage, \"enable-banner\": enableBanner}]}\n\t\t  data-overlayscrollbars-initialize\n\t",

        "originalContents": "\t\t\u003cscript is:inline define:vars={{DEFAULT_THEME, LIGHT_MODE, DARK_MODE, AUTO_MODE, BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND, PAGE_WIDTH, configHue}}\u003e\n\t\t\t// Load the theme from local storage\n\t\t\tconst theme = localStorage.getItem('theme') || DEFAULT_THEME;\n\t\t\tswitch (theme) {\n\t\t\t\tcase LIGHT_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\tcase DARK_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\tcase AUTO_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tif (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Load the hue from local storage\n\t\t\tconst hue = localStorage.getItem('hue') || configHue;\n\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.style.setProperty('--hue', hue);\n\n\t\t\t// calculate the --banner-height-extend, which needs to be a multiple of 4 to avoid blurry text\n\t\t\tlet offset = Math.floor(window.innerHeight * (BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND / 100));\n\t\t\toffset = offset - offset % 4;\n\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.style.setProperty('--banner-height-extend', &#96;${offset}px&#96;);\n\t\t\u003c/script\u003e\n\t\t\u003cstyle define:vars={{\n\t\t\tconfigHue,\n\t\t\t'page-width': &#96;${PAGE_WIDTH}rem&#96;,\n\t\t}}\u003e\u003c/style\u003e  \u003c!-- defines global css variables. This will be applied to \u003chtml\u003e \u003cbody\u003e and some other elements idk why --\u003e\n\n\n\t\t\u003cslot name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003clink rel=\"alternate\" type=\"application/rss+xml\" title={profileConfig.name} href={&#96;${Astro.site}rss.xml&#96;}/\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003c!-- MermaidJS --\u003e\n\t\t\u003cscript type=\"module\"\u003e\n\t\t\timport mermaid from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@10/dist/mermaid.esm.min.mjs';\n\t\t\tmermaid.initialize({ \n\t\t\t\tstartOnLoad: true,\n\t\t\t\ttheme: 'dark',\n\t\t\t\tsecurityLevel: 'loose'\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\twindow.mermaid = mermaid;\n\t\t\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\t\u003c/head\u003e\n\t\u003cbody class=\" min-h-screen transition \" class:list={[{\"lg:is-home\": isHomePage, \"enable-banner\": enableBanner}]}\n\t\t  data-overlayscrollbars-initialize\n\t",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function loadButtonScript() {\n    let switchBtn = document.getElementById(\"scheme-switch\");\n    if (switchBtn) {\n        switchBtn.onclick = function () {\n            switchTheme()\n        };\n    }\n\n    let settingBtn = document.getElementById(\"display-settings-switch\");\n    if (settingBtn) {\n        settingBtn.onclick = function () {\n            let settingPanel = document.getElementById(\"display-setting\");\n            if (settingPanel) {\n                settingPanel.classList.toggle(\"float-panel-closed\");\n            }\n        };\n    }\n\n    let menuBtn = document.getElementById(\"nav-menu-switch\");\n    if (menuBtn) {\n        menuBtn.onclick = function () {\n            let menuPanel = document.getElementById(\"nav-menu-panel\");\n            if (menuPanel) {\n                menuPanel.classList.toggle(\"float-panel-closed\");\n            }\n        };\n    }\n}\n\nloadButtonScript();\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n{import.meta.env.PROD \u0026\u0026 \u003cscript is:inline define:vars={{scriptUrl: url('/pagefind/pagefind.js')}}\u003e\nasync function loadPagefind() {\n    try {\n        const response = await fetch(scriptUrl, { method: 'HEAD' });\n        if (!response.ok) {\n            throw new Error(&#96;Pagefind script not found: ${response.status}&#96;);\n        }\n\n        const pagefind = await import(scriptUrl);\n\n        await pagefind.options({\n            excerptLength: 20\n        });\n\n        window.pagefind = pagefind;\n\n        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('pagefindready'));\n        console.log('Pagefind loaded and initialized successfully, event dispatched.');\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('Failed to load Pagefind:', error);\n        window.pagefind = {\n            search: () =\u003e Promise.resolve({ results: [] }),\n            options: () =\u003e Promise.resolve(),\n        };\n        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('pagefindloaderror'));\n        console.log('Pagefind load error, event dispatched.');\n    }\n}\n\n",

        "contents": "*/\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('link:click', () =\u003e {\n\t\t// Remove the delay for the first time page load\n\t\tdocument.documentElement.style.setProperty('--content-delay', '0ms')\n\n\t\t// prevent elements from overlapping the navbar\n\t\tif (!bannerEnabled) {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\tlet threshold = window.innerHeight * (BANNER_HEIGHT / 100) - 72 - 16\n\t\tlet navbar = document.getElementById('navbar-wrapper')\n\t\tif (!navbar || !document.body.classList.contains('lg:is-home')) {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e= threshold || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e= threshold) {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.add('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('content:replace', () =\u003e {\n\t\tinitCustomScrollbar();\n\t\t// Reinitialize MermaidJS after content replacement\n\t\tif (window.mermaid) {\n\t\t\twindow.mermaid.run();\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('visit:start', (visit: {to: {url: string}}) =\u003e {\n\t\t// change banner height immediately when a link is clicked\n\t\tconst bodyElement = document.querySelector('body')\n\t\tif (pathsEqual(visit.to.url, url('/'))) {\n\t\t\tbodyElement!.classList.add('lg:is-home');\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tbodyElement!.classList.remove('lg:is-home');\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// increase the page height during page transition to prevent the scrolling animation from jumping\n\t\tconst heightExtend = document.getElementById('page-height-extend')\n\t\tif (heightExtend) {\n\t\t\theightExtend.classList.remove('hidden')\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Hide the TOC while scrolling back to top\n\t\tlet toc = document.getElementById('toc-wrapper');\n\t\tif (toc) {\n\t\t\ttoc.classList.add('toc-not-ready')\n\t\t}\n\t});\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('page:view', () =\u003e {\n\t\t// hide the temp high element when the transition is done\n\t\tconst heightExtend = document.getElementById('page-height-extend')\n\t\tif (heightExtend) {\n\t\t\theightExtend.classList.remove('hidden')\n\t\t}\n\t});\n",

        "contents": "\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { AUTO_MODE, DARK_MODE, LIGHT_MODE } from \"@constants/constants.ts\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport Icon from \"@iconify/svelte\";\nimport {\n\tapplyThemeToDocument,\n\tgetStoredTheme,\n\tsetTheme,\n} from \"@utils/setting-utils.ts\";\nimport { onMount } from \"svelte\";\nimport type { LIGHT_DARK_MODE } from \"@/types/config.ts\";\n\nconst seq: LIGHT_DARK_MODE[] = [LIGHT_MODE, DARK_MODE, AUTO_MODE];\nlet mode: LIGHT_DARK_MODE = $state(AUTO_MODE);\n\nonMount(() =\u003e {\n\tmode = getStoredTheme();\n\tconst darkModePreference = window.matchMedia(\"(prefers-color-scheme: dark)\");\n\tconst changeThemeWhenSchemeChanged: Parameters\u003c\n\t\ttypeof darkModePreference.addEventListener\u003c\"change\"\u003e\n\t\u003e[1] = (_e) =\u003e {\n\t\tapplyThemeToDocument(mode);\n\t};\n\tdarkModePreference.addEventListener(\"change\", changeThemeWhenSchemeChanged);\n\treturn () =\u003e {\n\t\tdarkModePreference.removeEventListener(\n\t\t\t\"change\",\n\t\t\tchangeThemeWhenSchemeChanged,\n\t\t);\n\t};\n});\n\nfunction switchScheme(newMode: LIGHT_DARK_MODE) {\n\tmode = newMode;\n\tsetTheme(newMode);\n}\n\nfunction toggleScheme() {\n\tlet i = 0;\n\tfor (; i \u003c seq.length; i++) {\n\t\tif (seq[i] === mode) {\n\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tswitchScheme(seq[(i + 1) % seq.length]);\n}\n\nfunction showPanel() {\n\tconst panel = document.querySelector(\"#light-dark-panel\");\n\tpanel.classList.remove(\"float-panel-closed\");\n}\n\nfunction hidePanel() {\n\tconst panel = document.querySelector(\"#light-dark-panel\");\n\tpanel.classList.add(\"float-panel-closed\");\n}\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- z-50 make the panel higher than other float panels --\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { AUTO_MODE, DARK_MODE, LIGHT_MODE } from \"@constants/constants.ts\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport Icon from \"@iconify/svelte\";\nimport {\n\tapplyThemeToDocument,\n\tgetStoredTheme,\n\tsetTheme,\n} from \"@utils/setting-utils.ts\";\nimport { onMount } from \"svelte\";\nimport type { LIGHT_DARK_MODE } from \"@/types/config.ts\";\n\nconst seq: LIGHT_DARK_MODE[] = [LIGHT_MODE, DARK_MODE, AUTO_MODE];\nlet mode: LIGHT_DARK_MODE = $state(AUTO_MODE);\n\nonMount(() =\u003e {\n\tmode = getStoredTheme();\n\tconst darkModePreference = window.matchMedia(\"(prefers-color-scheme: dark)\");\n\tconst changeThemeWhenSchemeChanged: Parameters\u003c\n\t\ttypeof darkModePreference.addEventListener\u003c\"change\"\u003e\n\t\u003e[1] = (_e) =\u003e {\n\t\tapplyThemeToDocument(mode);\n\t};\n\tdarkModePreference.addEventListener(\"change\", changeThemeWhenSchemeChanged);\n\treturn () =\u003e {\n\t\tdarkModePreference.removeEventListener(\n\t\t\t\"change\",\n\t\t\tchangeThemeWhenSchemeChanged,\n\t\t);\n\t};\n});\n\nfunction switchScheme(newMode: LIGHT_DARK_MODE) {\n\tmode = newMode;\n\tsetTheme(newMode);\n}\n\nfunction toggleScheme() {\n\tlet i = 0;\n\tfor (; i \u003c seq.length; i++) {\n\t\tif (seq[i] === mode) {\n\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tswitchScheme(seq[(i + 1) % seq.length]);\n}\n\nfunction showPanel() {\n\tconst panel = document.querySelector(\"#light-dark-panel\");\n\tpanel.classList.remove(\"float-panel-closed\");\n}\n\nfunction hidePanel() {\n\tconst panel = document.querySelector(\"#light-dark-panel\");\n\tpanel.classList.add(\"float-panel-closed\");\n}\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- z-50 make the panel higher than other float panels --\u003e\n",

_**Agent (default)**_


修正を適用しました。`posts/`配下のページでサイドバーを非表示にし、記事コンテンツが広く表示されます。

## 実装内容

1. **postsページの判定**: URLパスが`/posts/`で始まるかをチェックする`isPostPage`変数を追加
2. **グリッドレイアウトの調整**: postsページでは`grid-cols-[auto]`（サイドバーなし）、それ以外は`grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]`
3. **サイドバーの条件付きレンダリング**: postsページではサイドバーを非表示
4. **main要素の幅調整**: postsページでは`col-span-1`で全幅を使用

これにより、`posts/`配下のページではサイドバーが非表示になり、記事コンテンツが広く表示されます。他のページ（ホーム、アーカイブなど）では従来通りサイドバーが表示されます。

変更を確認するには、開発サーバーを起動して`/posts/`配下のページを表示してください。

---

_**User (2026-02-22 18:24:26Z)**_

post配下にGETでアクセスすると、非表示になるが、ページ内リンクを踏んだだけでは非表示にならないです

---

        "originalContents": "\n\nfunction joinUrl(...parts: string[]): string {\n\tconst joined = parts.join(\"/\");\n\treturn joined.replace(/\\/+/g, \"/\");\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "---\nimport path from \"node:path\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tid?: string;\n\tsrc: string;\n\tclass?: string;\n\talt?: string;\n\tposition?: string;\n\tbasePath?: string;\n}\n\nimport { Image } from \"astro:assets\";\nimport { url } from \"../../utils/url-utils\";\n\nconst { id, src, alt, position = \"center\", basePath = \"/\" } = Astro.props;\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n\nconst isLocal = !(\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"/\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"http\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"https\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"data:\")\n);\nconst isPublic = src.startsWith(\"/\");\n\n// TODO temporary workaround for images dynamic import\n// https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/3373\n// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noImplicitAnyLet: \u003ccheck later\u003e\nlet img;\nif (isLocal) {\n\tconst files = import.meta.glob\u003cImageMetadata\u003e(\"../../**\", {\n\t\timport: \"default\",\n\t});\n\tlet normalizedPath = path\n\t\t.normalize(path.join(\"../../\", basePath, src))\n\t\t.replace(/\\\\/g, \"/\");\n\tconst file = files[normalizedPath];\n\tif (!file) {\n\t\tconsole.error(\n\t\t\t&#96;\\n[ERROR] Image file not found: ${normalizedPath.replace(\"../../\", \"src/\")}&#96;,\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\timg = await file();\n}\n\nconst imageClass = \"w-full h-full object-cover\";\nconst imageStyle = &#96;object-position: ${position}&#96;;\n---\n\u003cdiv id={id} class:list={[className, 'overflow-hidden relative']}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"transition absolute inset-0 dark:bg-black/10 bg-opacity-50 pointer-events-none\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n    {isLocal \u0026\u0026 img \u0026\u0026 \u003cImage src={img} alt={alt || \"\"} class={imageClass} style={imageStyle}/\u003e}\n    {!isLocal \u0026\u0026 \u003cimg src={isPublic ? url(src) : src} alt={alt || \"\"} class={imageClass} style={imageStyle}/\u003e}\n\u003c/div\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport path from \"node:path\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tid?: string;\n\tsrc: string;\n\tclass?: string;\n\talt?: string;\n\tposition?: string;\n\tbasePath?: string;\n}\n\nimport { Image } from \"astro:assets\";\nimport { url } from \"../../utils/url-utils\";\n\nconst { id, src, alt, position = \"center\", basePath = \"/\" } = Astro.props;\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n\nconst isLocal = !(\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"/\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"http\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"https\") ||\n\tsrc.startsWith(\"data:\")\n);\nconst isPublic = src.startsWith(\"/\");\n\n// TODO temporary workaround for images dynamic import\n// https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/3373\n// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noImplicitAnyLet: \u003ccheck later\u003e\nlet img;\nif (isLocal) {\n\tconst files = import.meta.glob\u003cImageMetadata\u003e(\"../../**\", {\n\t\timport: \"default\",\n\t});\n\tlet normalizedPath = path\n\t\t.normalize(path.join(\"../../\", basePath, src))\n\t\t.replace(/\\\\/g, \"/\");\n\tconst file = files[normalizedPath];\n\tif (!file) {\n\t\tconsole.error(\n\t\t\t&#96;\\n[ERROR] Image file not found: ${normalizedPath.replace(\"../../\", \"src/\")}&#96;,\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\timg = await file();\n}\n\nconst imageClass = \"w-full h-full object-cover\";\nconst imageStyle = &#96;object-position: ${position}&#96;;\n---\n\u003cdiv id={id} class:list={[className, 'overflow-hidden relative']}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"transition absolute inset-0 dark:bg-black/10 bg-opacity-50 pointer-events-none\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n    {isLocal \u0026\u0026 img \u0026\u0026 \u003cImage src={img} alt={alt || \"\"} class={imageClass} style={imageStyle}/\u003e}\n    {!isLocal \u0026\u0026 \u003cimg src={isPublic ? url(src) : src} alt={alt || \"\"} class={imageClass} style={imageStyle}/\u003e}\n\u003c/div\u003e\n",

        "contents": "---\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/400.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/500.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/700.css\";\n\nimport ConfigCarrier from \"@components/ConfigCarrier.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"@/config\";\nimport {\n\tAUTO_MODE,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_HOME,\n\tDARK_MODE,\n\tDEFAULT_THEME,\n\tLIGHT_MODE,\n\tPAGE_WIDTH,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport { defaultFavicons } from \"../constants/icon\";\nimport type { Favicon } from \"../types/config\";\nimport { pathsEqual, url } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\nimport \"katex/dist/katex.css\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n}\n\nlet { title, banner, description, lang, setOGTypeArticle } = Astro.props;\n\n// apply a class to the body element to decide the height of the banner, only used for initial page load\n// Swup can update the body for each page visit, but it's after the page transition, causing a delay for banner height change\n// so use Swup hooks instead to change the height immediately when a link is clicked\nconst isHomePage = pathsEqual(Astro.url.pathname, url(\"/\"));\n\n// defines global css variables\n// why doing this in Layout instead of GlobalStyles: https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6728#issuecomment-1502203757\nconst configHue = siteConfig.themeColor.hue;\nif (!banner || typeof banner !== \"string\" || banner.trim() === \"\") {\n\tbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n}\n\n// TODO don't use post cover as banner for now\nbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n\nconst enableBanner = siteConfig.banner.enable;\n\nlet pageTitle: string;\nif (title) {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${title} - ${siteConfig.title}&#96;;\n} else {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${siteConfig.title} - ${siteConfig.subtitle}&#96;;\n}\n\nconst favicons: Favicon[] =\n\tsiteConfig.favicon.length \u003e 0 ? siteConfig.favicon : defaultFavicons;\n\n// const siteLang = siteConfig.lang.replace('_', '-')\nif (!lang) {\n\tlang = &#96;${siteConfig.lang}&#96;;\n}\nconst siteLang = lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\");\n\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/400.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/500.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/700.css\";\n\nimport ConfigCarrier from \"@components/ConfigCarrier.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"@/config\";\nimport {\n\tAUTO_MODE,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_HOME,\n\tDARK_MODE,\n\tDEFAULT_THEME,\n\tLIGHT_MODE,\n\tPAGE_WIDTH,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport { defaultFavicons } from \"../constants/icon\";\nimport type { Favicon } from \"../types/config\";\nimport { pathsEqual, url } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\nimport \"katex/dist/katex.css\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n}\n\nlet { title, banner, description, lang, setOGTypeArticle } = Astro.props;\n\n// apply a class to the body element to decide the height of the banner, only used for initial page load\n// Swup can update the body for each page visit, but it's after the page transition, causing a delay for banner height change\n// so use Swup hooks instead to change the height immediately when a link is clicked\nconst isHomePage = pathsEqual(Astro.url.pathname, url(\"/\"));\n\n// defines global css variables\n// why doing this in Layout instead of GlobalStyles: https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6728#issuecomment-1502203757\nconst configHue = siteConfig.themeColor.hue;\nif (!banner || typeof banner !== \"string\" || banner.trim() === \"\") {\n\tbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n}\n\n// TODO don't use post cover as banner for now\nbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n\nconst enableBanner = siteConfig.banner.enable;\n\nlet pageTitle: string;\nif (title) {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${title} - ${siteConfig.title}&#96;;\n} else {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${siteConfig.title} - ${siteConfig.subtitle}&#96;;\n}\n\nconst favicons: Favicon[] =\n\tsiteConfig.favicon.length \u003e 0 ? siteConfig.favicon : defaultFavicons;\n\n// const siteLang = siteConfig.lang.replace('_', '-')\nif (!lang) {\n\tlang = &#96;${siteConfig.lang}&#96;;\n}\nconst siteLang = lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\");\n\n",

        "contents": "---\nimport path from \"node:path\";\nimport License from \"@components/misc/License.astro\";\nimport Markdown from \"@components/misc/Markdown.astro\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport MainGridLayout from \"@layouts/MainGridLayout.astro\";\nimport { getSortedPosts } from \"@utils/content-utils\";\nimport { getDir, getPostUrlBySlug } from \"@utils/url-utils\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport { licenseConfig } from \"src/config\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport PostMetadata from \"../../components/PostMeta.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"../../config\";\nimport { formatDateToYYYYMMDD } from \"../../utils/date-utils\";\n\nexport async function getStaticPaths() {\n\tconst blogEntries = await getSortedPosts();\n\treturn blogEntries.map((entry) =\u003e ({\n\t\tparams: { slug: entry.slug },\n\t\tprops: { entry },\n\t}));\n}\n\nconst { entry } = Astro.props;\nconst { Content, headings } = await entry.render();\n\nconst { remarkPluginFrontmatter } = await entry.render();\n\nconst jsonLd = {\n\t\"@context\": \"https://schema.org\",\n\t\"@type\": \"BlogPosting\",\n\theadline: entry.data.title,\n\tdescription: entry.data.description || entry.data.title,\n\tkeywords: entry.data.tags,\n\tauthor: {\n\t\t\"@type\": \"Person\",\n\t\tname: profileConfig.name,\n\t\turl: Astro.site,\n\t},\n\tdatePublished: formatDateToYYYYMMDD(entry.data.published),\n\tinLanguage: entry.data.lang\n\t\t? entry.data.lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\")\n\t\t: siteConfig.lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\"),\n\t// TODO include cover image here\n};\n---\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport path from \"node:path\";\nimport License from \"@components/misc/License.astro\";\nimport Markdown from \"@components/misc/Markdown.astro\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport MainGridLayout from \"@layouts/MainGridLayout.astro\";\nimport { getSortedPosts } from \"@utils/content-utils\";\nimport { getDir, getPostUrlBySlug } from \"@utils/url-utils\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport { licenseConfig } from \"src/config\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport PostMetadata from \"../../components/PostMeta.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"../../config\";\nimport { formatDateToYYYYMMDD } from \"../../utils/date-utils\";\n\nexport async function getStaticPaths() {\n\tconst blogEntries = await getSortedPosts();\n\treturn blogEntries.map((entry) =\u003e ({\n\t\tparams: { slug: entry.slug },\n\t\tprops: { entry },\n\t}));\n}\n\nconst { entry } = Astro.props;\nconst { Content, headings } = await entry.render();\n\nconst { remarkPluginFrontmatter } = await entry.render();\n\nconst jsonLd = {\n\t\"@context\": \"https://schema.org\",\n\t\"@type\": \"BlogPosting\",\n\theadline: entry.data.title,\n\tdescription: entry.data.description || entry.data.title,\n\tkeywords: entry.data.tags,\n\tauthor: {\n\t\t\"@type\": \"Person\",\n\t\tname: profileConfig.name,\n\t\turl: Astro.site,\n\t},\n\tdatePublished: formatDateToYYYYMMDD(entry.data.published),\n\tinLanguage: entry.data.lang\n\t\t? entry.data.lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\")\n\t\t: siteConfig.lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\"),\n\t// TODO include cover image here\n};\n---\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "---\nimport type { Page } from \"astro\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport { url } from \"../../utils/url-utils\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tpage: Page;\n\tclass?: string;\n\tstyle?: string;\n}\n\nconst { page, style } = Astro.props;\n\nconst HIDDEN = -1;\n\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n\nconst ADJ_DIST = 2;\nconst VISIBLE = ADJ_DIST * 2 + 1;\n\n// for test\nlet count = 1;\nlet l = page.currentPage;\nlet r = page.currentPage;\nwhile (0 \u003c l - 1 \u0026\u0026 r + 1 \u003c= page.lastPage \u0026\u0026 count + 2 \u003c= VISIBLE) {\n\tcount += 2;\n\tl--;\n\tr++;\n}\nwhile (0 \u003c l - 1 \u0026\u0026 count \u003c VISIBLE) {\n\tcount++;\n\tl--;\n}\nwhile (r + 1 \u003c= page.lastPage \u0026\u0026 count \u003c VISIBLE) {\n\tcount++;\n\tr++;\n}\n\nlet pages: number[] = [];\nif (l \u003e 1) pages.push(1);\nif (l === 3) pages.push(2);\nif (l \u003e 3) pages.push(HIDDEN);\nfor (let i = l; i \u003c= r; i++) pages.push(i);\nif (r \u003c page.lastPage - 2) pages.push(HIDDEN);\nif (r === page.lastPage - 2) pages.push(page.lastPage - 1);\nif (r \u003c page.lastPage) pages.push(page.lastPage);\n\nconst getPageUrl = (p: number) =\u003e {\n\tif (p === 1) return \"/\";\n\treturn &#96;/${p}/&#96;;\n};\n---\n\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport type { Page } from \"astro\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport { url } from \"../../utils/url-utils\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tpage: Page;\n\tclass?: string;\n\tstyle?: string;\n}\n\nconst { page, style } = Astro.props;\n\nconst HIDDEN = -1;\n\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n\nconst ADJ_DIST = 2;\nconst VISIBLE = ADJ_DIST * 2 + 1;\n\n// for test\nlet count = 1;\nlet l = page.currentPage;\nlet r = page.currentPage;\nwhile (0 \u003c l - 1 \u0026\u0026 r + 1 \u003c= page.lastPage \u0026\u0026 count + 2 \u003c= VISIBLE) {\n\tcount += 2;\n\tl--;\n\tr++;\n}\nwhile (0 \u003c l - 1 \u0026\u0026 count \u003c VISIBLE) {\n\tcount++;\n\tl--;\n}\nwhile (r + 1 \u003c= page.lastPage \u0026\u0026 count \u003c VISIBLE) {\n\tcount++;\n\tr++;\n}\n\nlet pages: number[] = [];\nif (l \u003e 1) pages.push(1);\nif (l === 3) pages.push(2);\nif (l \u003e 3) pages.push(HIDDEN);\nfor (let i = l; i \u003c= r; i++) pages.push(i);\nif (r \u003c page.lastPage - 2) pages.push(HIDDEN);\nif (r === page.lastPage - 2) pages.push(page.lastPage - 1);\nif (r \u003c page.lastPage) pages.push(page.lastPage);\n\nconst getPageUrl = (p: number) =\u003e {\n\tif (p === 1) return \"/\";\n\treturn &#96;/${p}/&#96;;\n};\n---\n\n",

        "contents": "---\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport { siteConfig } from \"../../config\";\nimport { url } from \"../../utils/url-utils\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tclass?: string;\n\theadings: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nlet { headings = [] } = Astro.props;\n\nlet minDepth = 10;\nfor (const heading of headings) {\n\tminDepth = Math.min(minDepth, heading.depth);\n}\n\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\nconst isPostsRoute = Astro.url.pathname.startsWith(url(\"/posts/\"));\n\nconst removeTailingHash = (text: string) =\u003e {\n\tlet lastIndexOfHash = text.lastIndexOf(\"#\");\n\tif (lastIndexOfHash !== text.length - 1) {\n\t\treturn text;\n\t}\n\n\treturn text.substring(0, lastIndexOfHash);\n};\n\nlet heading1Count = 1;\n\nconst maxLevel = siteConfig.toc.depth;\n---\n{isPostsRoute \u0026\u0026\n\u003ctable-of-contents class:list={[className, \"group\"]}\u003e\n    {headings.filter((heading) =\u003e heading.depth \u003c minDepth + maxLevel).map((heading) =\u003e\n            \u003ca href={&#96;#${heading.slug}&#96;} class=\"px-2 flex gap-2 relative transition w-full min-h-9 rounded-xl\n        hover:bg-[var(--toc-btn-hover)] active:bg-[var(--toc-btn-active)] py-2\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport { siteConfig } from \"../../config\";\nimport { url } from \"../../utils/url-utils\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tclass?: string;\n\theadings: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nlet { headings = [] } = Astro.props;\n\nlet minDepth = 10;\nfor (const heading of headings) {\n\tminDepth = Math.min(minDepth, heading.depth);\n}\n\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\nconst isPostsRoute = Astro.url.pathname.startsWith(url(\"/posts/\"));\n\nconst removeTailingHash = (text: string) =\u003e {\n\tlet lastIndexOfHash = text.lastIndexOf(\"#\");\n\tif (lastIndexOfHash !== text.length - 1) {\n\t\treturn text;\n\t}\n\n\treturn text.substring(0, lastIndexOfHash);\n};\n\nlet heading1Count = 1;\n\nconst maxLevel = siteConfig.toc.depth;\n---\n{isPostsRoute \u0026\u0026\n\u003ctable-of-contents class:list={[className, \"group\"]}\u003e\n    {headings.filter((heading) =\u003e heading.depth \u003c minDepth + maxLevel).map((heading) =\u003e\n            \u003ca href={&#96;#${heading.slug}&#96;} class=\"px-2 flex gap-2 relative transition w-full min-h-9 rounded-xl\n        hover:bg-[var(--toc-btn-hover)] active:bg-[var(--toc-btn-active)] py-2\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { type CollectionEntry, getCollection } from \"astro:content\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport { getCategoryUrl } from \"@utils/url-utils.ts\";\n\n// // Retrieve posts and sort them by publication date\nasync function getRawSortedPosts() {\n\tconst allBlogPosts = await getCollection(\"posts\", ({ data }) =\u003e {\n\t\treturn import.meta.env.PROD ? data.draft !== true : true;\n\t});\n\n\tconst sorted = allBlogPosts.sort((a, b) =\u003e {\n\t\tconst dateA = new Date(a.data.published);\n\t\tconst dateB = new Date(b.data.published);\n\t\treturn dateA \u003e dateB ? -1 : 1;\n\t});\n\treturn sorted;\n}",

        "originalContents": "import { type CollectionEntry, getCollection } from \"astro:content\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport { getCategoryUrl } from \"@utils/url-utils.ts\";\n\n// // Retrieve posts and sort them by publication date\nasync function getRawSortedPosts() {\n\tconst allBlogPosts = await getCollection(\"posts\", ({ data }) =\u003e {\n\t\treturn import.meta.env.PROD ? data.draft !== true : true;\n\t});\n\n\tconst sorted = allBlogPosts.sort((a, b) =\u003e {\n\t\tconst dateA = new Date(a.data.published);\n\t\tconst dateB = new Date(b.data.published);\n\t\treturn dateA \u003e dateB ? -1 : 1;\n\t});\n\treturn sorted;\n}",

params.getAll(\"tag\") : [];\ncategories = params.has(\"category\") ? params.getAll(\"category\") : [];\nconst uncategorized = params.get(\"uncategorized\");\n\ninterface Post {\n\tslug: string;\n\tdata: {\n\t\ttitle: string;\n\t\ttags: string[];\n\t\tcategory?: string;\n\t\tpublished: Date;\n\t};\n}\n\ninterface Group {\n\tyear: number;\n\tposts: Post[];\n}\n\nlet groups: Group[] = [];\n\nfunction formatDate(date: Date) {\n\tconst month = (date.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, \"0\");\n\tconst day = date.getDate().toString().padStart(2, \"0\");\n\treturn &#96;${month}-${day}&#96;;\n}\n\nfunction formatTag(tagList: string[]) {\n\treturn tagList.map((t) =\u003e &#96;#${t}&#96;).join(\" \");\n}\n\nonMount(async () =\u003e {\n\tlet filteredPosts: Post[] = sortedPosts;\n\n\tif (tags.length \u003e 0) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter(\n\t\t\t(post) =\u003e\n\t\t\t\tArray.isArray(post.data.tags) \u0026\u0026\n\t\t\t\tpost.data.tags.some((tag) =\u003e tags.includes(tag)),\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\n\tif (categories.length \u003e 0) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter(\n\t\t\t(post) =\u003e post.data.category \u0026\u0026 categories.includes(post.data.category),\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\n\tif (uncategorized) {\n\t\tfilteredPosts = filteredPosts.filter((post) =\u003e !post.data.category);\n\t}\n\n\tconst grouped = filteredPosts.reduce(\n\t\t(acc, post) =\u003e {\n\t\t\tconst year = post.data.published.getFullYear();\n\t\t\tif (!acc[year]) {\n\t\t\t\tacc[year] = [];\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tacc[year].push(post);\n\t\t\treturn acc;\n\t\t},\n\t\t{} as Record\u003cnumber, Post[]\u003e,\n\t);\n\n\tconst groupedPostsArray = Object.keys(grouped).map((yearStr) =\u003e ({\n\t\tyear: Number.parseInt(yearStr, 10),\n\t\tposts: grouped[Number.parseInt(yearStr, 10)],\n\t}));\n\n\tgroupedPostsArray.sort((a, b) =\u003e b.year - a.year);\n\n\tgroups = groupedPostsArray;\n});\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n",

```diff
@@ -132,3 +132,54 @@
  &lt;/div&gt;
  &lt;/Layout&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;script&gt;
+ function toggleSidebarForPostPage(pathname: string) {
+ 	const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar-container');
+ 	const mainGrid = document.getElementById('main-grid');
+ 	const mainContainer = document.getElementById('swup-container');
+ 	
+ 	if (!sidebar || !mainGrid || !mainContainer) return;
+ 	
+ 	const isPostPage = pathname.startsWith('/posts/');
+ 	
+ 	if (isPostPage) {
+ 		// Hide sidebar and adjust grid layout for post pages
+ 		sidebar.classList.add('hidden');
+ 		mainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');
+ 		mainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-[auto]');
+ 		mainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');
+ 		mainContainer.classList.add('col-span-1');
+ 	} else {
+ 		// Show sidebar and restore normal grid layout
+ 		sidebar.classList.remove('hidden');
+ 		mainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-[auto]');
+ 		mainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');
+ 		mainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-1');
+ 		mainContainer.classList.add('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');
+ 	}
+ }
+ 
+ // Initialize on page load
+ toggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);
+ 
+ // Setup Swup hooks for client-side navigation
+ const setup = () =&gt; {
+ 	window.swup.hooks.on('visit:start', (visit: {to: {url: string}}) =&gt; {
+ 		// Update sidebar visibility immediately when navigation starts
+ 		const url = new URL(visit.to.url, window.location.origin);
+ 		toggleSidebarForPostPage(url.pathname);
+ 	});
+ 	
+ 	window.swup.hooks.on('content:replace', () =&gt; {
+ 		// Update sidebar visibility after content is replaced
+ 		toggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);
+ 	});
+ };
+ 
+ if (window?.swup?.hooks) {
+ 	setup();
+ } else {
+ 	document.addEventListener('swup:enable', setup);
+ }
+ &lt;/script&gt;
  
```

</details>

_**Agent (default)**_


修正を完了しました。ページ内リンクを踏んだ場合でも、Swupのフックでサイドバーの表示/非表示を切り替えます。

## 実装内容

1. **サイドバーを常にレンダリング**: サーバーサイドとクライアントサイドの両方で一貫して動作するよう、サイドバーは常にレンダリングします。

2. **JavaScriptで表示/非表示を制御**: `toggleSidebarForPostPage`関数を追加し、URLパスに基づいてサイドバーの表示/非表示とグリッドレイアウトを切り替えます。

3. **Swupフックの設定**:
   - `visit:start`: リンククリック時に即座にサイドバーの表示/非表示を切り替え
   - `content:replace`: コンテンツ置換後にもサイドバーの状態を更新

4. **初期化**: ページ読み込み時にも`toggleSidebarForPostPage`を実行

これにより、`/posts/`配下のページでは：
- 直接GETでアクセスした場合
- ページ内リンクを踏んだ場合（Swup経由）

の両方でサイドバーが非表示になり、記事コンテンツが広く表示されます。

変更を確認するには、開発サーバーを起動して、`/posts/`配下のページに直接アクセスしたり、ページ内リンクを踏んだりして動作を確認してください。

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function toggleSidebarForPostPage(pathname: string) {\n\tconst sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');\n\tconst mainGrid = document.getElementById('main-grid');\n\tconst mainContainer = document.getElementById('swup-container');\n\t\n\tif (!sidebar || !mainGrid || !mainContainer) return;\n\t\n\tconst isPostPage = pathname.startsWith('/posts/');\n\t\n\tif (isPostPage) {\n\t\t// Hide sidebar and adjust grid layout for post pages\n\t\tsidebar.classList.add('hidden');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-[auto]');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.add('col-span-1');\n\t} else {\n\t\t// Show sidebar and restore normal grid layout\n\t\tsidebar.classList.remove('hidden');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-[auto]');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-1');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.add('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');\n\t}\n}\n\n// Initialize on page load\ntoggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);\n\n// Setup Swup hooks for client-side navigation\nconst setup = () =\u003e {\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('visit:start', (visit: {to: {url: string}}) =\u003e {\n\t\t// Update sidebar visibility immediately when navigation starts\n\t\tconst url = new URL(visit.to.url, window.location.origin);\n\t\ttoggleSidebarForPostPage(url.pathname);\n\t});\n\t\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('content:replace', () =\u003e {\n\t\t// Update sidebar visibility after content is replaced\n\t\ttoggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);\n\t});\n};\n\nif (window?.swup?.hooks) {\n\tsetup();\n} else {\n\tdocument.addEventListener('swup:enable', setup);\n}\n\u003c/script\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "{siteConfig.banner.enable \u0026\u0026 \u003cdiv id=\"banner-wrapper\" class={&#96;absolute z-10 w-full transition duration-700 overflow-hidden&#96;} style={&#96;top: -${BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND}vh&#96;}\u003e\n    \u003cImageWrapper id=\"banner\" alt=\"Banner image of the blog\" class:list={[\"object-cover h-full transition duration-700 opacity-0 scale-105\"]}\n                  src={siteConfig.banner.src} position={siteConfig.banner.position}\n    \u003e\n    \u003c/ImageWrapper\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e}\n\n\u003c!-- Main content --\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"absolute w-full z-30 pointer-events-none\" style={&#96;top: ${mainPanelTop}&#96;}\u003e\n    \u003c!-- The pointer-events-none here prevent blocking the click event of the TOC --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"relative max-w-[var(--page-width)] mx-auto pointer-events-auto\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv id=\"main-grid\" class:list={[\n            \"transition duration-700 w-full left-0 right-0 grid grid-rows-[auto_1fr_auto] lg:grid-rows-[auto] mx-auto gap-4 px-0 md:px-4\",\n            isPostPage ? \"grid-cols-[auto]\" : \"grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]\"\n        ]}\n",

        "contents": "        \u003e\n            \u003c!-- Banner image credit --\u003e\n            {hasBannerCredit \u0026\u0026 \u003ca href={siteConfig.banner.credit.url} id=\"banner-credit\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener\" aria-label=\"Visit image source\"\n                                   class:list={[\"group onload-animation transition-all absolute flex justify-center items-center rounded-full \" +\n                                   \"px-3 right-4 -top-[3.25rem] bg-black/60 hover:bg-black/70 h-9\", {\"hover:pr-9 active:bg-black/80\": hasBannerLink}]}\n            \u003e\n                \u003cIcon class=\"text-white/75 text-[1.25rem] mr-1\" name=\"material-symbols:copyright-outline-rounded\" \u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"text-white/75 text-xs\"\u003e{siteConfig.banner.credit.text}\u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cIcon class:list={[\"transition absolute text-[oklch(0.75_0.14_var(--hue))] right-4 text-[0.75rem] opacity-0\",\n                    {\"group-hover:opacity-100\": hasBannerLink}]}\n                      name=\"fa6-solid:arrow-up-right-from-square\"\u003e\n                \u003c/Icon\u003e\n            \u003c/a\u003e}\n\n\n            \u003cSideBar class=\"mb-4 row-start-2 row-end-3 col-span-2 lg:row-start-1 lg:row-end-2 lg:col-span-1 lg:max-w-[17.5rem] onload-animation\" headings={headings}\u003e\u003c/SideBar\u003e\n\n            \u003cmain id=\"swup-container\" class:list={[\n                \"transition-swup-fade overflow-hidden\",\n                isPostPage ?         "contents": "---\nimport BackToTop from \"@components/control/BackToTop.astro\";\nimport Footer from \"@components/Footer.astro\";\nimport Navbar from \"@components/Navbar.astro\";\nimport SideBar from \"@components/widget/SideBar.astro\";\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport TOC from \"../components/widget/TOC.astro\";\nimport { siteConfig } from \"../config\";\nimport {\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tMAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport Layout from \"./Layout.astro\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n\theadings?: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nconst {\n\ttitle,\n\tbanner,\n\tdescription,\n\tlang,\n\tsetOGTypeArticle,\n\theadings = [],\n} = Astro.props;\nconst hasBannerCredit =\n\tsiteConfig.banner.enable \u0026\u0026 siteConfig.banner.credit.enable;\nconst hasBannerLink = !!siteConfig.banner.credit.url;\n\nconst mainPanelTop = siteConfig.banner.enable\n\t? &#96;calc(${BANNER_HEIGHT}vh - ${MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT}rem)&#96;\n\t: \"5.5rem\";\n\n// Check if current page is a post page\nconst isPostPage = Astro.url.pathname.startsWith('/posts/');\n---\n\n\u003cLayout title={title} banner={banner} description={description} lang={lang} setOGTypeArticle={setOGTypeArticle}\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Navbar --\u003e\n\u003cslot slot=\"head\" name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\u003cdiv id=\"top-row\" class=\"z-50 pointer-events-none relative transition-all duration-700 max-w-[var(--page-width)] px-0 md:px-4 mx-auto\" class:list={[\"\"]}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"navbar-wrapper\" class=\"pointer-events-auto sticky top-0 transition-all\"\u003e\n        \u003cNavbar\u003e\u003c/Navbar\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Banner --\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport BackToTop from \"@components/control/BackToTop.astro\";\nimport Footer from \"@components/Footer.astro\";\nimport Navbar from \"@components/Navbar.astro\";\nimport SideBar from \"@components/widget/SideBar.astro\";\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport TOC from \"../components/widget/TOC.astro\";\nimport { siteConfig } from \"../config\";\nimport {\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tMAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport Layout from \"./Layout.astro\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n\theadings?: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nconst {\n\ttitle,\n\tbanner,\n\tdescription,\n\tlang,\n\tsetOGTypeArticle,\n\theadings = [],\n} = Astro.props;\nconst hasBannerCredit =\n\tsiteConfig.banner.enable \u0026\u0026 siteConfig.banner.credit.enable;\nconst hasBannerLink = !!siteConfig.banner.credit.url;\n\nconst mainPanelTop = siteConfig.banner.enable\n\t? &#96;calc(${BANNER_HEIGHT}vh - ${MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT}rem)&#96;\n\t: \"5.5rem\";\n\n// Check if current page is a post page\nconst isPostPage = Astro.url.pathname.startsWith('/posts/');\n---\n\n\u003cLayout title={title} banner={banner} description={description} lang={lang} setOGTypeArticle={setOGTypeArticle}\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Navbar --\u003e\n\u003cslot slot=\"head\" name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\u003cdiv id=\"top-row\" class=\"z-50 pointer-events-none relative transition-all duration-700 max-w-[var(--page-width)] px-0 md:px-4 mx-auto\" class:list={[\"\"]}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"navbar-wrapper\" class=\"pointer-events-auto sticky top-0 transition-all\"\u003e\n        \u003cNavbar\u003e\u003c/Navbar\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Banner --\u003e\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "---\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport Categories from \"./Categories.astro\";\nimport Profile from \"./Profile.astro\";\nimport Tag from \"./Tags.astro\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tclass?: string;\n\theadings?: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n---\n\u003cdiv id=\"sidebar\" class:list={[className, \"w-full\"]}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"flex flex-col w-full gap-4 mb-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cProfile\u003e\u003c/Profile\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"sidebar-sticky\" class=\"transition-all duration-700 flex flex-col w-full gap-4 top-4 sticky top-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cCategories class=\"onload-animation\" style=\"animation-delay: 150ms\"\u003e\u003c/Categories\u003e\n        \u003cTag class=\"onload-animation\" style=\"animation-delay: 200ms\"\u003e\u003c/Tag\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import Categories from \"./Categories.astro\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import Profile from \"./Profile.astro\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "import Tag from \"./Tags.astro\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "interface Props {"
          },
          {

        "originalContents": "---\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport Categories from \"./Categories.astro\";\nimport Profile from \"./Profile.astro\";\nimport Tag from \"./Tags.astro\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tclass?: string;\n\theadings?: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n---\n\u003cdiv id=\"sidebar\" class:list={[className, \"w-full\"]}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"flex flex-col w-full gap-4 mb-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cProfile\u003e\u003c/Profile\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"sidebar-sticky\" class=\"transition-all duration-700 flex flex-col w-full gap-4 top-4 sticky top-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cCategories class=\"onload-animation\" style=\"animation-delay: 150ms\"\u003e\u003c/Categories\u003e\n        \u003cTag class=\"onload-animation\" style=\"animation-delay: 200ms\"\u003e\u003c/Tag\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n",
        "range": {

            "line": 22
          },

        "contents": "---\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport I18nKey from \"../../i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"../../i18n/translation\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tid: string;\n\tname?: string;\n\tisCollapsed?: boolean;\n\tcollapsedHeight?: string;\n\tclass?: string;\n\tstyle?: string;\n}\nconst { id, name, isCollapsed, collapsedHeight, style } = Astro.props;\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n---\n\u003cwidget-layout data-id={id} data-is-collapsed={String(isCollapsed)} class={\"pb-4 card-base \" + className} style={style}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"font-bold transition text-lg text-neutral-900 dark:text-neutral-100 relative ml-8 mt-4 mb-2\n        before:w-1 before:h-4 before:rounded-md before:bg-[var(--primary)]\n        before:absolute before:left-[-16px] before:top-[5.5px]\"\u003e{name}\u003c/div\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id={id} class:list={[\"collapse-wrapper px-4 overflow-hidden\", {\"collapsed\": isCollapsed}]}\u003e\n        \u003cslot\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n    {isCollapsed \u0026\u0026 \u003cdiv class=\"expand-btn px-4 -mb-2\"\u003e\n        \u003cbutton class=\"btn-plain rounded-lg w-full h-9\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"text-[var(--primary)] flex items-center justify-center gap-2 -translate-x-2\"\u003e\n                \u003cIcon name=\"material-symbols:more-horiz\" class=\"text-[1.75rem]\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e {i18n(I18nKey.more)}\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/button\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e}\n\u003c/widget-layout\u003e\n\n\u003cstyle define:vars={{ collapsedHeight }}\u003e\n    .collapsed {\n        height: var(--collapsedHeight);\n    }\n\u003c/style\u003e\n\n",

        "contents": "\n    \u003c!-- search bar inside panel for phone/tablet --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"search-bar-inside\" class=\"flex relative lg:hidden transition-all items-center h-11 rounded-xl\n      bg-black/[0.04] hover:bg-black/[0.06] focus-within:bg-black/[0.06]\n      dark:bg-white/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 dark:focus-within:bg-white/10\n  \"\u003e\n        \u003cIcon icon=\"material-symbols:search\" class=\"absolute text-[1.25rem] pointer-events-none ml-3 transition my-auto text-black/30 dark:text-white/30\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n        \u003cinput placeholder=\"Search\" bind:value={keywordMobile}\n               class=\"pl-10 absolute inset-0 text-sm bg-transparent outline-0\n               focus:w-60 text-black/50 dark:text-white/50\"\n        \u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- search results --\u003e\n    {#each result as item}\n        \u003ca href={item.url}\n           class=\"transition first-of-type:mt-2 lg:first-of-type:mt-0 group block\n       rounded-xl text-lg px-3 py-2 hover:bg-[var(--btn-plain-bg-hover)] active:bg-[var(--btn-plain-bg-active)]\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"transition text-90 inline-flex font-bold group-hover:text-[var(--primary)]\"\u003e\n                {item.meta.title}\u003cIcon icon=\"fa6-solid:chevron-right\" class=\"transition text-[0.75rem] translate-x-1 my-auto text-[var(--primary)]\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"transition text-sm text-50\"\u003e\n                {@html item.excerpt}\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/a\u003e\n    {/each}\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cstyle\u003e\n  input:focus {\n    outline: 0;\n  }\n  .search-panel {\n    max-height: calc(100vh - 100px);\n    overflow-y: auto;\n  }\n\u003c/style\u003e\n",
